message: Btw, what we talked about before, me getting triggered by conflict... I think maybe we should just go ahead as normal and see what happens. My fear of getting triggered shouldn't dictate how we play. If I do get triggered, then we'll go from there. Okay?
Ok sure, if thats what you think is best. Like i said Biron is gonna be changing slowly over time as his character develops anyway. But yea we can continue as is as long as ua fine with it.
Thanks for letting us know. I'll check in on you anyway, and remember, we can all call a T" time out at any time."
Coffee, surely! 😛
Let's see how it goes. I know I'm in good hands with you all, so even if the worst happens, I can recover.
I'm glad to hear it.
Do we want to skip downtime activity and go straight into the mission?
Well, Orin's had plans for upgrading their bow.
Hmm... there are some rp things Quinn would like to say/do... but that can wait till mission start so it don't slow things up.
I want Biron to do some training with some of the guards. Its pretty much just fighting/sparing.
Who wants to go first?
I volunteer Orin 😃
Ha ha I think you just volunteered yourself, Mark 😃
Quinn finds the woman drowning her sorrows alone in the mess tent. She stares balefully at Quinn as he approaches, clearly in her cups.
clears his throat and sits down next to her.

You knew the victim I 'ear? Well, I never did - more shame me. But listen, I won't keep ya from ya grief. 'fing is, when the spear landed, the lad fell into my arms and erm... his coinpurse kinda fell into me pocket like...
pulls out a coinpurse and puts it beside the woman.

I've taken none - by the father I wanted to... but kinda thought it wouldn't be right none. Best you have it, or give it to the boy's family. Whatever you be think. Three Kastenburg crowns if you be wondering.

The woman blearily stares at the coinpurse, silent for a moment. Then she seems to draw something from within, stands, takes the coinpurse. She nods and leaves the tent, whether to return the coins or spend them you never find out.
shrugs and walks away grumbling to himself.
Join a mercenary company they said, see the world and make your fortune... grumble grumble...
